title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED, FOB THE PROVINCE OF CEBU.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3087 / 55 OG No. 35, 7311 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2459, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED, FOB THE PROVINCE OF CEBU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

f,

section two of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
